reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNINzVybjVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy 4/9/24 a las 15:15 hs los que me cargaron el combustible me discriminaron me maltrataron .. No recomiendo cargar ahí .. te maltratan.. llovía mucho, intente limpiar los faros del auto y el parabrisas... y me gritaron que no podia mojar el piso... PERO LLOVIA Y ESTABA TODO MOJADO... me maltrataron, me gritaron y quiza era porque me movia en un ford ka 2013... no era un auto nuevo ni grande.... una discriminación total. DEBEN ENSEÑARLES BUENOS MODALES A LA GENTE QUE TRABAJA ALLI... en otras estaciones de servicios los playeros te limpian los parabrisas... siempre soy agradecido...

(Translated by Google)
Today 4/9/24 at 3:15 pm the people who filled my gas tank discriminated against me, they mistreated me... I do not recommend filling up there... they mistreat you... it was raining a lot, I tried to clean the car headlights and the windshield... and they yelled at me that I couldn't wet the floor... BUT IT WAS RAINING AND EVERYTHING WAS WET... they mistreated me, they yelled at me and maybe it was because I was driving a 2013 Ford KA... it wasn't a new or big car... total discrimination. THEY SHOULD TEACH THE PEOPLE WHO WORK THERE GOOD MANNERS... at other gas stations the gas station attendants clean your windshields... I am always grateful...

reviewReply.comment:
Señor Javier
No entendemos el motivo de su reclamo ya que el mismo es muy escueto.
Lo invitamos a acercarse a nuestra Estación para aclarar el tema y darnos la oportunidad de tomar las acciones que fueran necesarias.

reviews.comment:
Son perros con el uso del baño, quizás sea que por estar en el centro la gente local los quiera tomar como baño público.  Pero deben saber distinguir a los turistas y viajeros.

(Translated by Google)
They're dogs using the restroom; perhaps because they're in the city center, locals treat them like a public toilet. But they should be able to distinguish tourists and travelers.
